path-a: Path A uses a single date $match, $addFields revenue computation, composite group keys, and Python round() instead of server-side $round.
path-b: Path B adds a second $match to filter orphaned orders, uses inline $multiply inside $group with scalar product_id keys, and MongoDB $round in $push.
path-c: Path C replaces the simple $lookup with a correlated pipeline $lookup, aggregating join conditions server-side rather than relying on $unwind filtering alone.
